label: 第165話
source_locator: 単行本19巻 目次 p.67
summary_short: 虎杖はパチンコ店への不法侵入で有罪となり、呪力を没収される。術式を持たない虎杖は呪力操作そのものを失った状態で日車と戦う。
summary_full: 虎杖は証拠の内容を読み違え、パチンコ店への不法侵入で有罪判決を受ける。刑罰「没収」は本来術式を奪うが、生得術式を持たない虎杖からは呪力操作そのものを奪った。日車は木槌を自在に変形・操作して襲い、虎杖は呪力なしの身体能力だけで耐える。虎杖は誅伏賜死の規則を分析し、再審を求めて再び領域へ入る方法を選ぶ。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 日車寛見 isn't just a brilliant lawyer, he's a naturally gifted sorcerer as well. Up against such a fierce opponent, 悠仁 must overcome slim chances of victory while fighting without the use of his 呪力 .
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: " What stands out most about him is his talent as a sorcerer. " 日車寛見 is a thirty-six-year-old man and a member of the Iwate Bar Associate who has always overcome major challenges such as his law school entrance exams and the bar exam that proceeded it. To 日車, it was all just a matter of applying the right amount of effort to acquire the required knowledge. His peers always considered 日車 a genius but now something stands out about him even more than this. Continuing to attack 悠仁, 日車 lunches and smashes down at 悠仁 with his gavel. 悠仁 jumps back to avoid it but 日車 makes the gavel appear in his other hand, allowing him to quickly attack again. 日車 continues to switch the gavel into his free hand while smashing rapidly toward his opponent. 悠仁 narrowly avoids the barrage and tries to counterattack with an elbow. 日車 switches the shape of the gavel into a flexible hook and wraps it around 悠仁's inner elbow before tossing his adversary away and reverting the gavel to normal. What stands out even more about 日車 than his genius as a lawyer is his talent as a sorcerer . Without his 呪力, 悠仁 finds himself at the mercy of 日車. 日車 learned the basics of barrier techniques by analyzing the 領域展開 that came by default with his awakening as a sorcerer. By working backward from there, 日車 gained an instinctive grasp of how to reinforce his body with 呪力. Within twelve days of this awakening, 日車 has blossomed into a combatant comparable to a grade 1 sorcerer. He exorcised several 呪霊 before entering the 東京 No.1 Colony and has eliminated at least twenty players since. Before going on the offensive against 悠仁 again, 日車 asks him if he can't control his 呪力. 悠仁 is confused because 日車 is the reason for it but apparently, the confiscation penalty takes away the person's ability to use cursed techniques . Since 悠仁 doesn't possess an innate 術式, the effect fell to stopping him from utilizing his 呪力 altogether. This concerns 日車 because somehow 悠仁 has been able to survive thus far. He quickly surmises it must be due to incredible physical prowess. Normally confiscation weakens 日車's opponents' 呪力 control as a result of losing their 術式. Losing the ability to use 呪力 is even worse and yet 悠仁 is still fighting. This makes 日車 take him as a very serious threat and focuses on not allowing himself to get tripped up. 悠仁 manages to earn a retrial. Determined to crush 悠仁 with all his might, 日車 shifts his gavel into a staff and attacks with a flurry of swings. 悠仁 is able to avoid them and grabs onto the staff's middle section, only for 日車 to make it disappear before he can pull it away. 悠仁 jumps back and kicks the tub 日車 was laying in early. 日車 breaks the tub apart with his gavel, unleashing a rush of water and broken tub pieces. 悠仁 shields his face and his opponent erupts from behind the screen of water. 日車 increases his gavel to a massive size and slams it on top of 悠仁. Even this isn't enough to crush 悠仁 even though he's barely able to withstand the weight of the impact. Impressed, 日車 compares his experience to fighting an indestructible doll. However, 悠仁 knows he's in serious trouble and can't hold on much longer under the weight of the giant gavel. 悠仁 doesn't even attempt to defend his case and takes responsibility for what happened in 渋谷. 悠仁 considers 日車's technique to be exceptionally strong and thinks this must also mean there's a compensatory weakness. He frantically recalls his interactions with 日車 thus far and remembers the mental notes he made about the trial-based 術式. Before he's crushed, 悠仁 calls out 日車's name and demands a retrial, instantly transporting them both inside the domain. Since no violence can occur within the domain, 悠仁 is saved and expresses his immediate relief. 日車 sees that 悠仁 is beginning to understand his technique. ジャッジマン declared 悠仁 guilty and sentenced him, so if 悠仁 doesn't confess his guilty outright, he can request a retrial that can't be refused. In the next trial, ジャッジマン announces that 悠仁 is accused of mass murder in 渋谷 on October 31, 2018. Knowing he's referring to 宿儺 's rampage during the 渋谷事変 , 悠仁 is shocked. 日車 receives evidence, but before he even has a chance to speak, 悠仁 immediately admits he's guilty. He won't lie and he refuses to deny what happened, shocking the lawyer. Bleeding from its eyes with rage, the irate ジャッジマン declares 悠仁 guilty. He punishes 悠仁 with confiscation as an additional punishment to accompany the death penalty.

candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京第1結界／池袋 渋谷 (言及のみ) 池袋

candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 日車寛見の術式 領域展開：誅伏賜死／式神 ジャッジマン

key_events_verified_phase9: 虎杖が不法侵入で有罪となる
没収によって虎杖の呪力操作が失われる
虎杖が呪力なしで日車の攻撃を耐える
虎杖が再審を要求する
verification_notes_phase9: 集英社公式18～20巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別・話別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第九段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
